Safety First

Certifications & Safety Standards

Every garment meets or exceeds international safety standards for children's clothing.

OEKO-TEX Standard 100

Certified free from harmful substances. Safe for direct skin contact, even for newborns.

GOTS Organic Cotton

Global Organic Textile Standard certified. Sustainably grown, no pesticides or chemicals.

EN 14682 Compliant

Cord and drawstring safety for children's clothing. No choking hazards.

CPSIA / CCPSA Ready

Meets USA and Canada children's product safety regulations for lead and phthalates.

Flame Resistant Options

Available for sleepwear. CP 47/EN 14878 compliant nightwear on request.

Snaps & Fasteners

All buttons and snaps are pull-tested. Nickel-free metal components as standard.

Ready to Launch Your Kids Clothing Line?

Get a free quote with sample pricing. We offer size grading, tech pack development, and full compliance documentation.
